backgrounds.name: Artisan
backgrounds.desc: Skilled in creating quality goods with judgment and training; finds satisfaction in work done properly without cutting corners.
backgrounds.equipment: Trade tools in good condition, practical working clothes, project materials, small sum of money, guild/union membership.

backgrounds.name: Criminal
backgrounds.desc: Operates in the grey area between legality and necessity; possesses knowledge of how locks, people, and systems fail.
backgrounds.equipment: Dark practical clothing, lockpicks, weapon of debatable legality, medium sum of money, favor/debt note.

backgrounds.name: Labourer
backgrounds.desc: Experienced in hard physical work; understands how things are built, grown, and maintained through manual toil.
backgrounds.equipment: Sturdy worn clothing, trade tools, small sum of money, letter from employer/guild.

backgrounds.name: Military
backgrounds.desc: Served a larger institution; understands how to follow orders, fight, and how systems function when ideals fade.
backgrounds.equipment: Former uniform, service weapon, bedroll, small/medium sum of money, discharge papers/commendation.

backgrounds.name: Performer
backgrounds.desc: Experienced in commanding attention and evoking emotion; understands crowds, timing, and the courage of the stage.
backgrounds.equipment: Costume/performance outfit, instrument or prop, practical clothes, small/medium sum of money, letter from admirer/patron.

backgrounds.name: Destitute
backgrounds.desc: Grew up in a world not made for them; survived through wit, stubbornness, and the ability to make something from nothing.
backgrounds.equipment: Threadbare practical clothing, item of personal significance, almost no money, a debt owed to them.

backgrounds.name: Privileged
backgrounds.desc: Born into comfort and high social standing; instinctively understands how power and social circles operate.
backgrounds.equipment: Fine clothing, signet ring/mark of station, personal servant, large sum of money, letter of introduction

backgrounds.name: Sailor
backgrounds.desc: Shaped by the demands of the sea; skilled in navigation, weather-reading, and living in close quarters with others.
backgrounds.equipment: Weatherproof clothing, good knife, rope, worn nautical chart, small sum of money, letter from a port.

backgrounds.name: Scholar
backgrounds.desc: Dedicated to deep, specific study at the cost of time and relationships; possesses specialized knowledge others overlook.
backgrounds.equipment: Ink-stained clothing, writing materials, two reference texts, small sum of money, academic letter/thesis.

backgrounds.name: Servant
backgrounds.desc: Worked within the homes of the powerful; privy to the private reality of those in charge and the secrets behind closed doors.
backgrounds.equipment: Modest uniform/livery, practical clothing, reference letter, small sum of money, a house key.

backgrounds.name: Trader
backgrounds.desc: Understands the price of everything; experienced in negotiation, moving goods, and the thin line between profit and ruin.
backgrounds.equipment: Decent travelling clothes, scales, well-kept ledger, medium sum of money, outstanding contract/promissory note.

backgrounds.name: Wanderer
backgrounds.desc: Always on the move; familiar with the freedom of the road and the reality of being a stranger in every place.
backgrounds.equipment: Practical travelling clothes, bedroll, week of rations, optimistic map, small sum of money, memento.

powers.name: Action Surge
powers.desc: Once per Fight, you can push past your limits. You may take one additional Action this Round.

powers.name: Armour Expert
powers.desc: While wearing armour, gain +1 to your Evasion.

powers.name: Artisan Expert
powers.desc: Once per scene, you may spend 10 minutes on a Crafting or Knowledge (Engineering) roll to automatically treat the result as your die's maximum value.

powers.name: Blind Fighting
powers.desc: Within Close Range you sense anything not behind total cover, ignore the effects of darkness and obscuration, and cannot be surprised.

powers.name: Bulwark
powers.desc: Once per Fight, as a Bonus Action, you shout at all foes within Melee range, making your presence on the battlefield demand attention. This Round, if they attack anyone other than you, they do so at a Disadvantage.

powers.name: Camouflage
powers.desc: As a Bonus Action, if you press yourself against a solid surface or go prone and hold still, you gain an Advantage on Stealth rolls for as long as you remain motionless.

powers.name: Cursed
powers.desc: When you roll the lowest result on any d6 or greater, gain a Token of Misfortune. Spend a Token as a Bonus Action to turn an enemy's success into a failure. Tokens reset after a Rest.

powers.name: Danger Sense
powers.desc: You gain an Advantage on rolls to avoid visible effects (traps, visible attacks) provided you are not Incapacitated.

powers.name: Explorer
powers.desc: You ignore difficult terrain. When in wilderness, your first attack each Fight gains an Advantage, you cannot be surprised, and when scavenging you find twice the resources.

powers.name: Foresight
powers.desc: Use your Perception die for Evasion rolls instead of Agility, observing attack-patterns.

powers.name: Fortitude
powers.desc: Your Knock Out threshold increases by your Strength Max. You can repeat this Power.

powers.name: Improved Recovery
powers.desc: After a Rest, you may recover a total of 5 Injury ranks distributed however you choose, up to 2 ranks per Injury.

powers.name: Inspiration
powers.desc: Once per Fight, as a Bonus Action, you can inspire an ally that can see you. That ally gains an Advantage on their next roll.

powers.name: Inspiring Orator
powers.desc: After 10 minutes addressing up to six characters, each gains a bonus to their Knock Out threshold equal to your Spirit Average until their next Rest.

powers.name: Jack of All Trades
powers.desc: When making a roll for a skill you have no ranks in, you may add 1 to the result.

powers.name: Keen Senses
powers.desc: Choose one sense (sight, hearing, etc.). Rolls relying on that sense gain an Advantage. Can be taken multiple times, once for each sense.

powers.name: Learned
powers.desc: When you make a Knowledge roll, do so at an Advantage.

powers.name: Linguist
powers.desc: You speak and read an additional language fluently. This Power can be taken multiple times, once per language.

powers.name: Lucky
powers.desc: Once per Fight, when you roll the lowest result on any d6 or greater, you may reroll it and must use the new result.

powers.name: Martial Arts
powers.desc: Use Agility instead of Strength for unarmed/light weapon attacks. You can chain one unarmed strike as a Bonus Action if you hit with a melee Martial Arts Attack.

powers.name: Night Vision
powers.desc: You can see clearly in low light and dim conditions. You treat total darkness as heavily obscured rather than blinding.

powers.name: Nimble
powers.desc: You can move through spaces occupied by hostile characters freely. You gain an Advantage on rolls to escape a Grapple and on rolls to Grapple others.

powers.name: Prediction
powers.desc: Use your Intelligence die for Evasion rolls instead of Agility, predicting attacks.

powers.name: Second Wind
powers.desc: At the end of a fight, reduce 1 Injury gained in that fight by 1 Rank.

powers.name: Spirited
powers.desc: Your Knock Out threshold increases by your Spirit Max. You can repeat this Power.

powers.name: Swift
powers.desc: Your Move increases to 45ft.

powers.name: Telepathy
powers.desc: You can communicate silently with any willing character you can see in your language of choice. You may also attempt to read surface thoughts of an unwilling character as an Action. Make an Opposed Spirit Roll to succeed.

powers.name: Toughness
powers.desc: Use your Strength die for Evasion rolls instead of Agility, toughing-out blows.

powers.name: Unhindered Movement
powers.desc: If not Encumbered, you traverse vertical surfaces and liquids without falling/sinking if you start/end on solid ground.

powers.name: Waterborne
powers.desc: Swimming does not reduce your Movement. You can hold your breath for up to 10 minutes.

powers.name: Willpower
powers.desc: Use your Spirit die for Evasion rolls instead of Agility, putting mind over matter.
